recommendations.title: 3-Iron
recommendations.overview: A drifter lives in people's houses while they are away and repays them by doing chores for them. His life changes when he meets a beautiful woman who wants to escape her unhappy marriage.

recommendations.title: A Violent Prosecutor
recommendations.overview: After a prosecution lawyer is framed and convicted for murder, he tries to catch the real murderer from jail with the help of a con artist.

recommendations.title: Hot Young Bloods
recommendations.overview: A comedy romance movie about the last generation of youths and their passionate romance based in Hongseong, Chungcheong Namdo in the 1980s.

recommendations.title: Officer Black Belt
recommendations.overview: A talented martial artist who can't walk past a person in need unites with a probation officer to fight and prevent crime as a martial arts officer.

recommendations.title: Silmido
recommendations.overview: On 31 January 1968, 31 North Korean commandos infiltrated South Korea in a failed mission to assassinate President Park Chung-hee. In revenge, the South Korean military assembled a team of 31 criminals on the island of Silmido to kill Kim Il-sung for

recommendations.title: Sex Is Zero
recommendations.overview: Eun-sik tries to pass the state exam while studying in college after his military service. One day, he meets a beautiful woman Eun-hyo, and his life changes.

recommendations.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
recommendations.overview: After barely surviving a brutal attack by a sadistic serial killer, crime boss Jang Dong-su is left humiliated. Determined to catch the killer known as K, he forms an uneasy alliance with Jung Tae-seok, a relentless and incorruptible detective who of

recommendations.title: Big Time Adolescence
recommendations.overview: A seemingly bright and mostly innocent 16-year-old named Mo attempts to navigate high school under the guidance of his best friend Zeke, an unmotivated-yet-charismatic college dropout. Although Zeke genuinely cares about Mo, things start to go awry a

recommendations.title: 20th Century Girl
recommendations.overview: In 1999, a teen girl keeps close tabs on a boy in school on behalf of her deeply smitten best friend – then she gets swept up in a love story of her own.

recommendations.title: The Roundup 2
recommendations.overview: The 'Beast Cop' Ma Seok-do heads to a foreign country to extradite a suspect, but soon after his arrival, he discovers additional murder cases and hears about a vicious killer who has been committing crimes against tourists for several years.
